text:
毎度この瞬間が
たまらないのよねー！

今回はどんなスゴい体験ができるのか
もうワクワクしちゃうよ。

あはは！　はしゃぎすぎだね。
これじゃどっちが先輩かわかんないよ。

ま、初心に返って
がんばっ
I'll never grow sick of this feeling, I tell ya!

I'm so excited about all the crazy stuff we're
about to face off against, I can hardly contain
myself!

Listen to me though, I sound like a kid.
Which one of us was supposed to be
the senior Braver here, again?

I guess it's never bad to feel like a rookie
again and feel that push to get better, though!
